item.title: Negotiate Like a Pro! 💪 • Research salary ranges for your role. • Identify key skills that add value. • Prepare a list of achievements to discuss. • Practice negotiation conversations with a friend. • Use: “I achieved X% by Y.” to showcase impact. What unique skills can you leverage to strengthen your negotiation position? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Negotiate Like a Pro! 💪 • Research salary ranges for your role. • Identify key skills that add value. • Prepare a list of achievements to discuss. • Practice negotiation conversations with a friend. • Use: “I achieved X% by Y.” to showcase impact. What unique skills can you leverage to strengthen your negotiation position? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
